reach.label: Reach
reach.hint: Where it's based vs how far it serves.

brandStatement.title: A FAIRER GAME
brandStatement.description: The discovery ecosystem for Minecraft servers. Built for real players, real trust, and the community.

benefitItems.title: VERIFIED REVIEWS
benefitItems.description: Playtime-gated reviews make reputation signals more reliable.

benefitItems.title: DATA-DRIVEN DISCOVERY
benefitItems.description: Find servers by meaningful signals instead of paid placement.

benefitItems.title: CROSS-GAME POTENTIAL
benefitItems.description: Designed for Minecraft and future worlds.

page.title: WELCOME TO FIRSTSPAWN
page.subtitle: Log in to access your favorite servers and communities.
page.registeredSuccess: Registration complete. You can sign in now.

page.title: START YOUR JOURNEY
page.subtitle: Join the verified ecosystem for Minecraft.

form.legalDisclaimer: By joining, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. We never post to connected accounts without permission.
form.marketingConsentLabel: I want to receive product updates and marketing emails from FirstSpawn.

activation.instruction: Please activate your account by clicking on the link provided in it.
activation.message: You will soon receive an email on the following address:
activation.providerWarning: Services like Hotmail, Yahoo, AOL often mistakenly identify the activation email as spam!
activation.spamWarning: Please remember to check your spam and trash box!!!
activation.title: CHECK YOUR INBOX

cta.title: Ready to find your
cta.subtitle: Stop wasting time on pay-to-win billboards. Discover communities backed by verified uptime and real player retention.

brand.name: FIRSTSPAWN
brand.description: The infrastructure for reliable voxel multiplayer discovery. We prioritize performance data over paid placements.

bottom.copyright: © {year} FirstSpawn. Not affiliated with Hypixel Studios or Mojang.

connectionBanner.down: We're having trouble reaching FirstSpawn. Some features may not work until the connection is restored.
connectionBanner.degraded: FirstSpawn is running in a degraded state. Some features may be slow or unavailable.

cookieConsent.title: COOKIE SETTINGS
cookieConsent.introPrefix: Our website uses essential cookies and limited technical data to keep FirstSpawn secure, maintain your session, remember language preferences, and protect core platform functionality.
cookieConsent.introSuffix: about how these settings affect your experience.
cookieConsent.consentPrefix: With your permission, FirstSpawn may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the platform, improve discovery flows, and make ranking, trust, and onboarding systems more reliable. See our
cookieConsent.consentSuffix: for more detail. Analytics providers may act as
cookieConsent.essentialDescription: Required for account security, session continuity, language settings, and the basic operation of the platform. These remain enabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDescription: Helps us measure traffic, understand feature usage, and improve product decisions without turning discovery into paid placement.
cookieConsent.manageDescription: With your permission, FirstSpawn may use analytics cookies to understand how visitors use the platform and to improve discovery, trust, and onboarding systems. Essential cookies remain enabled because they support the secure and reliable operation of the site.
cookieConsent.categoryUnavailable: Personalization and marketing cookies are not currently active on FirstSpawn.

hero.subtitle: Honest discovery for Minecraft — ranked by real activity and community trust, never by who paid more.

activeTonight.title: Active tonight
activeTonight.emptyDescription: Run seeds or register a server to populate the catalog.

ranking.title: Today's ranking
ranking.formulaHint: rank = activity × trust × freshness — tap a rank number
ranking.emptyDescription: Rankings update automatically as heartbeat data accrues.

globe.title: Servers around the world
globe.subtitle: Every server, placed where it calls home. Global servers light up their origin and pulse out across the planet.
globe.hint: Drag to spin · click a beacon to visit
globe.emptyTitle: No servers on the map yet
globe.emptyDescription: As servers are listed and located, they'll appear here on the globe.

ownerCta.title: Run a server?
ownerCta.description: List it free. Earn your place through uptime, activity and player trust — and see exactly which signals move your rank.

newsletter.title: GET LAUNCH UPDATES
newsletter.description: Follow the beta as discovery, reputation, and server-owner tools come online.

results.emptyDescription: Try removing some filter chips or look for different keywords.
results.loadError: Couldn't load worlds. Check your connection and try again.

Survival.title: Survival gameplay
Survival.description: Traditional resource gathering, building, and player-driven commerce.

Whitelist.title: Whitelisted access
Whitelist.description: Requires an application to verify intent and maturity.

Economy.title: Economy systems
Economy.description: Player shops, virtual auctions, stable currency design.

Trading.title: Player trading
Trading.description: Safe peer-to-peer trading interfaces, barter zones.

Towny.title: Town management
Towny.description: Claim regions, establish taxes, join nations with neighbors.

Skyblock.title: Sky islands
Skyblock.description: Start on a minimal void island, expand through challenges.

RPG.title: Roleplay elements
RPG.description: Custom classes, leveling trees, unique gear sets.

Hardcore.title: High stakes
Hardcore.description: Limited lives, permanent status effects, dangerous nights.

Seasonal.title: Seasonal cycles
Seasonal.description: World resets every 3-6 months with custom themes.

Creative.title: Sandbox building
Creative.description: Free build zones, plot sharing, design tools.

Showcase.title: Guided tours
Showcase.description: Walk featured creations with their makers.

rank.title: Why it ranks where it does
rank.subtitle: rank = activity × trust × freshness — same math for every server, never sold

featureCards.title: What makes it different
featureCards.subtitle: owner-curated, capped at four — each card requires a real in-game screenshot

media.title: Media
media.subtitle: trailer is rendered from the server's live map data — never generated imagery
media.provenanceChip: ⬡ rendered from live world data · auto-refreshed weekly

sidebar.factsFootnote: facts are owner-declared · checked against live pings

voting.heading: Vote for this server
voting.successBody: Your vote has been counted for this server.
voting.alreadyVotedBody: You can vote again after 00:00 UTC. Thanks for the support!
voting.rewardEnabledNote: This server delivers in-game rewards when you vote.
voting.rewardNotEnabledNote: This server hasn't enabled in-game vote rewards, but your vote still counts.

leaderboard.title: Top voters
leaderboard.unverifiedNameNote: Unverified Minecraft names. FirstSpawn does not confirm that a voter owns the name shown.
leaderboard.emptyState: No votes yet this period. Be the first to vote!
leaderboard.errorState: Could not load the leaderboard. Please try again.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: This Terms of Service page is being finalized. By creating an account, you agree to FirstSpawn platform usage rules, account responsibility, and acceptable conduct policies.
terms.noticeBody: We're writing the full Terms of Service. Until it's published, the summary above describes how the platform operates. Check back soon for the complete document.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This Privacy Policy page is being finalized. By creating an account, you acknowledge data processing for account security, product operations, and communications preferences.
privacy.noticeBody: We're writing the full Privacy Policy. Until it's published, the summary above describes how we handle your data. Check back soon for the complete document.

consolePage.title: CONSOLE
consolePage.description: Welcome back, {username}. Personal server analytics, verification controls, and account command tools will live in this panel.

rankSignals.activityHint: players actually online, hour by hour
rankSignals.trustHint: verified ownership, moderation record, player reports
rankSignals.freshnessHint: how recently the listing's data was confirmed

header.title: List your server
header.summary: Free, and stays free. You start unranked — your place is earned through measured activity, trust and freshness, never bought.

address.title: Where does your world live?
address.description: We ping it first. Your listing is built on what we can measure — the form comes second.
address.errorUnreachable: We couldn't reach that server. Double-check the host and port, then try again.
address.geyserLabel: This Java server also accepts Bedrock players (GeyserMC / Floodgate).
address.errorAddressTaken: This address is already listed on FirstSpawn. If you own it, file a report to claim it (coming soon).

ownership.title: Prove it's yours.
ownership.description: One verification, two ways to do it. This unlocks the owner console, signed updates and the ✓ on your links — and it's what keeps impersonators off FirstSpawn.
ownership.motdBody: Add the token to your MOTD for one restart. We pick it up on the next ping.
ownership.selectHint: Pick one method, add the token, then verify.
ownership.failedLabel: We couldn't find your token yet. Add it, give it a moment, then try again.
ownership.dnsUnavailable: Not available for a raw IP — point a domain at your server to use DNS, or verify by MOTD.

profile.title: Introduce your world.
profile.description: Short on purpose. Screenshots, feature cards and the trailer come after publishing — this is just enough for players to find you.
profile.blurbPlaceholder: Seasonal survival with hosted events and a player-run market.
profile.countryHint: where the server is hosted · pick Global if you serve everyone
profile.nameTakenLabel: That name is already taken. Try another.

preview.draftTitle: This is how players will see you.
preview.draftDescription: Measured numbers come from our pings; everything you typed is marked owner-declared. You start unranked and climb as signals accrue.
preview.publishedDescription: First crawl is underway. Your player thread is open, and the owner console is unlocked — feature cards, verified links and the world trailer all live there.
preview.fallbackBlurb: Seasonal survival with hosted events and a player-run market.
preview.publishErrorLabel: We couldn't publish your listing. Please try again.

header.title: Owner console
header.summary: {count} worlds · ✓ ownership verified · nothing here buys rank

empty.title: No servers listed under your account.

overview.firstCrawlBody: Measured stats appear within the hour — rank and standing follow as signals accrue. Your player thread is already open.
overview.signalsNote: same math as everyone · never sold

profile.savedNote: ✓ Saved — live in under a minute

media.policyNote: in-game captures only · generated or stock imagery is removed and costs trust standing

trailer.title: World trailer
trailer.provenanceNote: ⬡ rendered from live world data · never generated imagery
trailer.lockNotePending: {name}'s crawl finishes within the hour — the studio unlocks the moment we have measured world data.
trailer.filmBody: We read your live map — the same data players see — find your most-visited builds, and film a cinematic flythrough. About a minute. Nothing is invented: if it's in the trailer, it's on your server.
trailer.addressNote: verified address · re-renders weekly so the trailer never goes stale
trailer.renderingBody: Watching the render plan as it happens — every shot comes from real chunks.

stages.label: Detecting landmarks
stages.detail: 12 candidate builds scored by visit density

trailer.previewBody: Four passes over your most-visited builds at dawn light. Publish it, or re-render with a different time of day.
trailer.publishedBody: Players see it on firstspawn.com/{slug} with its provenance chip. It re-renders weekly.

health.title: Listing health
health.footnote: health never affects rank directly — it just makes the signals you already earn visible to players

links.label: Verified links
links.notePending: add website and Discord links, then verify

featureCards.label: Feature cards
featureCards.notePending: 0 of 4 — each needs an in-game screenshot

trailer.label: World trailer
trailer.noteUnrendered: not rendered yet — trailers drive engagement

ownerConsole.deleteConfirm: Delete “{name}”? This removes the listing and its data for good.
